name: 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie
description: The 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie is cut in a relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders and a structured hood. Finished with subtle embroidered 2F branding on the chest, a kangaroo pocket, and ribbed cuffs and hem for a clean, everyday shape.
shortDescription: Relaxed, slightly oversized heavyweight hoodie with subtle 2F branding.
fit: Relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders.
materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Do not iron on print/embroidery].
sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.
